mapper.select: SELECT id, room_id AS roomId, scope_type AS scopeType, start_datetime AS startDateTime, end_datetime AS endDateTime, week_day AS weekDay, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, reason FROM rental_room_unavailable_slot WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0 AND ( (scope_type = 'DATE_RANGE' AND start_datetime <= #{toDateTime} AND end_datetime >= #{fromDateTime}) OR (scope_type = 'ONE_TIME' AND start_datetime <= #{toDateTime} AND end_datetime >= #{fromDateTime}) OR (scope_type = 'WEEKLY_TIME') ) ORDER BY COALESCE(start_datetime, '1970-01-01') ASC, scope_type ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_room_unavailable_slot ( room_id, scope_type, start_datetime, end_datetime, week_day, start_time, end_time, reason, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{scopeType}, #{startDateTime}, #{endDateTime}, #{weekDay}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, NOW(), #{actorId}, NOW(), #{actorId}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_room_unavailable_slot SET scope_type = #{scopeType}, start_datetime = #{startDateTime}, end_datetime = #{endDateTime}, week_day = #{weekDay}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, reason = #{reason}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{actorId} WHERE id = #{id} AND room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0
